title: Slim Fit Oxford Shirt
description: Premium cotton Oxford shirt with a modern slim fit. Perfect for both casual and semi-formal occasions.

title: Floral Wrap Dress
description: Elegant floral wrap dress with a flattering silhouette. Made from lightweight, breathable fabric.

title: Classic Leather Sneakers
description: Handcrafted leather sneakers with cushioned insoles. Timeless design meets everyday comfort.

title: Graphic Print T-Shirt
description: 100% cotton graphic tee with bold artistic prints. Relaxed fit for maximum comfort.

title: High-Waist Skinny Jeans
description: Stretch denim high-waist jeans with a flattering skinny fit. Perfect everyday essential.

title: Velvet Matte Lipstick Set
description: Long-lasting velvet matte finish lipstick set with 3 stunning shades. Enriched with vitamin E.

title: Kids Rainbow Hoodie
description: Colorful cotton-blend hoodie for kids. Soft, warm and perfect for playtime.

title: Aviator Sunglasses
description: UV400 protection aviator sunglasses with polarized lenses. Lightweight metal frame.

title: Tailored Blazer
description: Impeccably tailored blazer in premium wool blend. Perfect for business and evening events.

title: Boho Maxi Skirt
description: Flowing boho-style maxi skirt with artistic print. Elastic waistband for comfort.

title: Running Performance Shoes
description: Ultra-lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper.

title: Hydrating Face Serum
description: Hyaluronic acid face serum for deep hydration. Visibly plumps and smooths skin.

title: Denim Dungarees
description: Adorable denim dungarees with adjustable straps. Durable and easy to wash.

title: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Genuine leather crossbody bag with adjustable strap. Multiple compartments for organization.

title: Polo Neck T-Shirt
description: Classic polo neck t-shirt in premium pique cotton. Ribbed collar and cuffs.

title: Embroidered Kurti
description: Beautifully embroidered straight-cut kurti. Perfect for festive occasions.

title: Sports Watch
description: Premium sports watch with chronograph function. Water resistant to 100m.

title: Block Heel Sandals
description: Elegant block heel sandals with ankle strap. Comfortable for all-day wear.

title: Kids Party Dress
description: Gorgeous party dress with tulle skirt and sequin details. Every little girl's dream.

title: Perfume Gift Set
description: Luxury perfume gift set with 3 signature fragrances. Long-lasting scents for every mood.

title: Minimalist Ceramic Watch
description: Sleek and minimalist ceramic watch with a scratch-resistant face. Perfect for modern, everyday wear.

title: Chunky Knit Sweater
description: Oversized chunky knit sweater. Soft, warm, and perfect for layering during colder months.

title: Classic Denim Jacket
description: Timeless denim jacket with a rugged, worn-in look. Features multiple pockets and durable stitching.

title: Organic Cotton Baby Onesie
description: Super soft, 100% organic cotton onesie. Gentle on delicate skin with easy snap closures.

title: Waterproof Hiking Boots
description: Durable, waterproof hiking boots with high-traction soles. Designed for the toughest trails.
